name: Fire Bolt
description: Hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object. On a hit it takes 1d10 fire damage; a flammable object that isn't worn or carried ignites. The damage increases as you gain levels.

name: Ray of Frost
description: A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward a creature. On a hit it takes 1d8 cold damage and its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

name: Mage Hand
description: A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. You can use it to manipulate objects, open doors or containers, and carry up to 10 pounds.

name: Prestidigitation
description: A minor magical trick used by novice spellcasters: create sensory effects, light or snuff a candle, clean or soil an object, or produce a small trinket or illusory mark.

name: Light
description: Touch one object no larger than 10 feet in any dimension to make it shed bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet, in a color of your choice.

name: Sacred Flame
description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature within range. It must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d8 radiant damage. The target gains no benefit from cover for this save.

name: Guidance
description: Touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one ability check of its choice.

name: Vicious Mockery
description: Unleash a string of magical insults at a creature you can see. It must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 1d4 psychic damage and have disadvantage on its next attack roll before the end of its next turn.

name: Eldritch Blast
description: A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature. On a hit it takes 1d10 force damage. You create additional beams at higher levels, and may direct them at the same or different targets.

name: Produce Flame
description: A flickering flame appears in your hand, shedding bright light in a 10-foot radius. You can hurl it at a creature within 30 feet for 1d8 fire damage on a hit.

name: Shillelagh
description: Imbue a club or quarterstaff you hold so its damage die becomes a d8 and it uses your spellcasting ability for attack and damage rolls instead of Strength.

name: Thaumaturgy
description: You manifest a minor wonder within range: amplify your voice, cause flames to flicker or change color, create harmless tremors, or open and close unlocked doors and windows.

name: Minor Illusion
description: Create a sound or an image of an object within range that lasts for the duration. A creature can use its action to investigate the illusion with an Intelligence (Investigation) check.

name: Magic Missile
description: Create three glowing darts of magical force. Each dart hits a creature of your choice within range automatically, dealing 1d4+1 force damage. Higher-level slots create one extra dart each.

name: Shield
description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you. Until the start of your next turn you gain a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and take no damage from magic missile.

name: Cure Wounds
description: A creature you touch regains hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs. Higher-level slots heal an additional 1d8 each.

name: Healing Word
description: A creature of your choice within range regains hit points equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs. Higher-level slots heal an additional 1d4 each.

name: Bless
description: Bless up to three creatures of your choice within range. Whenever a target makes an attack roll or a saving throw before the spell ends, it may add a d4 to the roll.

name: Detect Magic
description: For the duration you sense the presence of magic within 30 feet. You can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object that bears magic, and learn its school of magic.

name: Burning Hands
description: A thin sheet of flames shoots from your fingertips. Each creature in a 15-foot cone makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d6 fire damage on a failure or half as much on a success.

name: Charm Person
description: Attempt to charm a humanoid you can see. It makes a Wisdom saving throw with advantage if you or your companions are fighting it; on a failure it is charmed by you until the spell ends or you harm it.

name: Mage Armor
description: Touch a willing creature who isn't wearing armor. Until the spell ends, the target's base AC becomes 13 + its Dexterity modifier. The spell ends if the target dons armor.

name: Sleep
description: Roll 5d8; the total is how many hit points of creatures this spell can affect. Starting with the lowest current hit points, creatures in a 20-foot radius fall unconscious until the spell ends or they take damage.

name: Faerie Fire
description: Each object in a 20-foot cube and each creature there that fails a Dexterity saving throw is outlined in light. Attack rolls against an affected creature or object have advantage and it can't benefit from invisibility.

name: Hunter's Mark
description: Mark a creature you can see as your quarry. You deal an extra 1d6 damage to it whenever you hit it with a weapon attack, and you have advantage on Perception and Survival checks to find it.

name: Hex
description: Place a curse on a creature you can see. You deal an extra 1d6 necrotic damage to it when you hit it with an attack, and it has disadvantage on ability checks made with an ability of your choice.

name: Hellish Rebuke
description: In response to being damaged, you point at the attacker and it is surrounded by flames. It makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d10 fire damage on a failure or half as much on a success.

name: Thunderwave
description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. Each creature in a 15-foot cube makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 2d8 thunder damage and being pushed 10 feet on a failure, or half damage on a success.

name: Disguise Self
description: Make yourself, including clothing and equipment, look different until the spell ends. The illusion fails any physical inspection, but a creature can use its action to make an Investigation check to discern it.

name: Misty Step
description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

name: Hold Person
description: Choose a humanoid you can see. It must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for the duration, repeating the save at the end of each of its turns to end the effect.

name: Scorching Ray
description: Create three rays of fire and hurl them at targets within range. Make a ranged spell attack for each ray; on a hit a target takes 2d6 fire damage. Higher-level slots create one extra ray each.

name: Invisibility
description: A creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. The effect ends for a target that attacks or casts a spell.

name: Spiritual Weapon
description: Create a floating spectral weapon within range. As a bonus action you can move it up to 20 feet and make a melee spell attack, dealing 1d8 + your spellcasting modifier force damage on a hit.

name: Lesser Restoration
description: You touch a creature and can end one disease or one condition afflicting it: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

name: Aid
description: Bolster up to three creatures within range. Each target's hit point maximum and current hit points increase by 5 for the duration. Higher-level slots increase the bonus by 5 each.

name: Darkness
description: Magical darkness spreads from a point within range to fill a 15-foot radius sphere. The darkness spreads around corners and cannot be penetrated by nonmagical light or darkvision.

name: Spider Climb
description: Until the spell ends, a willing creature you touch gains the ability to move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and ceilings while leaving its hands free, and has a climbing speed equal to its walking speed.

name: Fireball
description: A bright streak flashes to a point within range and blossoms into flame. Each creature in a 20-foot radius makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 fire damage on a failure or half as much on a success.

name: Counterspell
description: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. A spell of 3rd level or lower fails automatically; for higher levels, make an ability check against DC 10 + the spell's level.

name: Fly
description: A willing creature you touch gains a flying speed of 60 feet for the duration. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft.

name: Lightning Bolt
description: A stroke of lightning forms a line 100 feet long and 5 feet wide. Each creature in the line makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 lightning damage on a failure or half as much on a success.

name: Dispel Magic
description: Choose a creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on the target ends; for higher-level spells make an ability check against DC 10 + the spell's level to end it.

name: Revivify
description: You touch a creature that has died within the last minute. That creature returns to life with 1 hit point. This spell can't return a creature that has died of old age, nor restore missing body parts.

name: Haste
description: Choose a willing creature. Until the spell ends its speed doubles, it gains +2 AC, advantage on Dexterity saving throws, and an additional action each turn. When the spell ends the target can't move or act for one turn.

name: Hypnotic Pattern
description: Create a twisting pattern of colors in a 30-foot cube. Each creature in the area that fails a Wisdom saving throw becomes charmed and incapacitated for the duration, ending if it takes damage or is shaken awake.
